items.title: Senior Ukrainian intelligence official jailed for life for spying for Russia
items.dek: Col Dmytro Kozyura agreed to share state secrets and systematically disclosed classified information, prosecutors say.
items.body: Col Dmytro Kozyura agreed to share state secrets and systematically disclosed classified information, prosecutors say.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Housing board votes to freeze New York rents in victory for Mamdani
items.dek: The decision was welcomed by many tenants - but landlords fear it will worsen housing conditions.
